SEARCH
Package org.key_project.proofmanagement.io

Class ProofBundleHandler

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.proofmanagement.io.ProofBundleHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
Closeable, AutoCloseable
Direct Known Subclasses:
DirectoryProofBundleHandler, ZipProofBundleHandler
public abstract class ProofBundleHandler extends Object implements Closeable
Provides methods to collect paths of files inside a proof bundle.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    protected static class 
    ProofBundleHandler.TreeFileVisitor
    A FileVisitor for creating a file tree from the visited paths.

    protected static final PathMatcher

    This matcher matches *.java, *.class, *.zip, and *.jar files.

    This matcher matches *.key files.

    Returns a tree of the complete file hierarchy inside the bundle.

    Returns a list of all paths to *.key files in the bundle.

    Creates a path to the entry with the given name inside the bundle.
    abstract List<Path>
    getProofFiles()
    Returns a list of all paths to *.proof files in the bundle.
    abstract List<Path>
    getSourceFiles()
    Returns a list of all paths to Java source files in the bundle.
    abstract Path
    getTopLevelProjectFile()
    Returns the path to the top-level `project.key` file in the bundle, if existing, otherwise null.
    abstract Path
    relativize(Path path)
    Relativies the input path with respect to the bundle root.

  • Field Details

    • PROOF_MATCHER

      protected static final PathMatcher PROOF_MATCHER
      This matcher matches *.proof files.

      This matcher matches *.key files.

      protected static final PathMatcher SRC_MATCHER
      This matcher matches *.java files.

      protected static final PathMatcher CLASSPATH_MATCHER
      This matcher matches *.java, *.class, *.zip, and *.jar files.

      protected static final PathMatcher BOOTCLASSPATH_MATCHER
      This matcher matches *.java files.

  • Constructor Details

    • ProofBundleHandler

      public ProofBundleHandler()

  • Method Details

    • getBundleName

      public abstract String getBundleName()
      Returns the name of the proof bundle.
      Returns:
      the name as a String

    • getBundlePath

      public abstract Path getBundlePath()
      Returns the root path of the proof bundle.
      Returns:
      the path of the bundle

    • relativize

      public abstract Path relativize(Path path)
      Relativies the input path with respect to the bundle root.
      Parameters:
      path - the path to relativize, assumed to point to a file in the bundle
      Returns:
      the input path relative to the bundle root

    • getProofFiles

      public abstract List<Path> getProofFiles() throws ProofManagementException
      Returns a list of all paths to *.proof files in the bundle. Only *.proof files residing top-level in the bundle are considered.
      Returns:
      a list of paths to the *.proof files
      Throws:
      ProofManagementException - if the bundle can not be opened/accessed

    • getKeYFiles

      public abstract List<Path> getKeYFiles() throws IOException
      Returns a list of all paths to *.key files in the bundle. Only *.key files residing top-level in the bundle are considered.
      Returns:
      a list of paths to the *.key files
      Throws:
      IOException - if the bundle can not be opened/accessed

    • getSourceFiles

      public abstract List<Path> getSourceFiles() throws IOException
      Returns a list of all paths to Java source files in the bundle. Only *.java files residing inside the src subfolder are considered.
      Returns:
      a list of paths to the source files
      Throws:
      IOException - if the bundle can not be opened/accessed

    • getClasspathFiles

      public abstract List<Path> getClasspathFiles() throws IOException
      Returns a list of all classpath files in the bundle. This includes only files inside the classpath subfolder. Considered file extensions are "java", "class", "zip" and "jar".
      Returns:
      a list of paths to the classpath files
      Throws:
      IOException - if the bundle can not be opened/accessed

    • getBootclasspath

      public abstract Path getBootclasspath() throws IOException
      Returns the bootclasspath of the bundle. This is the bootclasspath subfolder, if it exists. Otherwise null is returned.
      Returns:
      the bootclasspath or null, if none is specified
      Throws:
      IOException - if the bundle can not be opened/accessed

    • getTopLevelProjectFile

      public abstract Path getTopLevelProjectFile()
      Returns the path to the top-level `project.key` file in the bundle, if existing, otherwise null.
      Returns:
      the path to the top-level project file or null

    • getFileTree

      public abstract PathNode getFileTree() throws IOException
      Returns a tree of the complete file hierarchy inside the bundle.
      Returns:
      the file tree of the bundle
      Throws:
      IOException - if the bundle can not be opened/accessed

    • getPath

      public abstract Path getPath(String entryName)
      Creates a path to the entry with the given name inside the bundle.
      Parameters:
      entryName - the entry name inside the bundle
      Returns:
      the path of the entry

    • createBundleHandler

      public static ProofBundleHandler createBundleHandler(Path root) throws IOException
      Static factory method to create a ProofBundleHandler based on the type of the proof bundle (zipped bundle or directory).
      Parameters:
      root - the path of the proof bundle
      Returns:
      a bundle handler suited for opening the type of proof bundle root points to.
      Throws:
      IOException - if the bundle can not be opened/accessed
